description: Vertical incident timeline with 4 events, date on left, event card on right, last item highlighted

fields.TITLE_TEXT: Title above the timeline, e.g. 'INCIDENT TIMELINE'
fields.EVENT_1: Description of event 1, e.g. 'Initial phishing email sent to 3,000 employees'
fields.EVENT_2: Description of event 2, e.g. 'Credentials harvested from 47 accounts'
fields.EVENT_3: Description of event 3, e.g. 'Lateral movement detected across 12 servers'
fields.EVENT_4: Description of event 4 (critical), e.g. 'Data exfiltration begins — 4.5TB transferred'
